candidate_definition_hints.text: The devkit of the nuPlan dataset.

FROM ubuntu:20.04 RUN apt-get update \ && apt-get install -y curl gnupg2 software-properties-common default-jdk ENV APT_KEY_DONT_WARN_ON_DANGEROUS_USAGE=DontWarn RUN curl -fsSL https://bazel.build/bazel-release.pub.gpg | apt-key add - \ && curl -fsSL https://nvidia.github.io/nvi…
